rationale: The citing paper references Sudhir and Rao (2006) only once, in a brief footnote alongside Rao and McLaughlin (1989), to note rare prior studies that used internal decision-form data in organizational buying contexts. The citation serves as general background positioning about data limitations in prior B2B research. The paper does not build its model, hypotheses, identification, or interpretation on the cited paper's slotting-allowance theory or findings.
